calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Asa Electronics Llc
Off Calendar Jul-26-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Christopher F. Tuttle of the law offices of The Chanler Group (510.848.8880) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Asa Electronics LLC is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Written order and Judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2017 Continued To Sep-06-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar May-15-2017 Continued To Jul-26-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production From Defendant Asa Electronics Llc And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-25-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, The Court adopted it's tentative ruling; PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S Motion To Compel Responses To Special Interrogatories And Requests For Production From Defendant Asa Electronics Llc And Request For Sanctions is off calendar per the request of the moving party. Judge Pro tem: Mark LeHocky; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/JPT.
